title: Pushing My AI Dark Factory to Its Limits with Opus + Kimi Combined
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates a technique for combining Claude Opus and Kimi K2.6 models in an AI-driven code generation system. Opus handles high-complexity reasoning and planning tasks while Kimi K2.6 manages implementation and validation, achieving better efficiency at scale without routing all tasks to expensive models.
